lint.detail: Warnings present (unused variables in drawing/lib.rs, fonts/rasterize.rs, kernel includes) but no errors

appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md: Node size 60→72 bytes to reflect shadow fields addition
Added Gaussian Blur section to architecture.md documenting blur_surface API, NEON acceleration, radius cap, kernel approximation, and scratch buffer requirements
Added Shadow Rendering section to architecture.md documenting render_shadow pattern, 4 MiB cap, damage tracking, opacity interaction, and Node shadow fields

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add NEON testing guidance: NEON SIMD test cases should use buffer dimensions NOT divisible by the SIMD lane width (e.g., width=33 instead of width=32) to exercise tail/boundary code paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: gaussian-blur-primitive review: neon_blur_matches_scalar uses w=32 (perfectly aligned), so the NEON tail path for handling remaining < 4 pixels is never tested.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md test count drift (mentions ~1555, actual is 1718)
rejectedObservations.reason: AGENTS.md is maintained by the orchestrator and already acknowledges approximate counts. The count changes every milestone. This is a normal drift, not a gap requiring immediate action.

rejectedObservations.observation: Node convention followed correctly for box-shadow-rendering
rejectedObservations.reason: Confirmation of existing practice — no action needed
